message:
test(serve): add case-insensitivity tests for Content-Type detection

Adds test cases verifying isJSONContent handles case variations
correctly per RFC 2616 Section 3.7.

New test cases:
- "Application/JSON" (capitalized)
- "APPLICATION/JSON" (all uppercase)
- "Application/Json; charset=utf-8" (mixed case with params)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
